Masterstone CRM

Connecting to database…

Welcome — let's locate your database

This is your first launch of the Mac app. Choose your masterstone.db file and we'll copy it into the app's data folder. After this, the app will use it directly — you won't need to do this again.

The file will be installed at:

Don't have a masterstone.db file yet? Run the Session 2 migration script (migrate.py) on your latest backup JSON to generate one.

Setup needed

Database file not found.
